hints.GREEK: Ancient civilization that gave us democracy and Plato
hints.ROMAN: Ancient empire centered on the city of Rome
hints.EGYPTIAN: Civilization of pharaohs along the Nile
hints.MAYAN: Mesoamerican civilization known for advanced astronomy
hints.ZEUS: King of the Olympian gods, wielder of thunder
hints.APOLLO: God of the sun, music, and prophecy
hints.ATHENA: Goddess of wisdom; born from Zeus's head
hints.POSEIDON: God of the sea, brother of Zeus
hints.COLOSSEUM: Roman amphitheater famous for gladiator games
hints.PETRA: Rose-red city carved into rock cliffs in Jordan
hints.STONEHENGE: Prehistoric ring of standing stones in England
hints.CUNEIFORM: Wedge-shaped writing pressed into clay tablets
hints.SANSKRIT: Ancient Indian language of sacred Hindu texts
hints.RUNES: Letters of Old Norse and Germanic alphabets
